How Advanced Is My Gum Disease. Gum infections are divided into gingivitis and periodontitis. Gingivitis is the early stage on infection that involves tenderness, swelling, inflammation, and bleeding gums, and it can usually be reversed with a sincere commitment to better brushing and flossing habits. Periodontitis, on the other hand, causes permanent damage such as jawbone erosion, a receding gumline, and tooth loss.
